name: Pheasant in Spiced Sour Cream
recipeIngredient: A few drops of Tabasco sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust the pheasant pieces with flour.
2. Brown the flour-dusted pheasant in butter.
3. Mix equal parts sour cream and water in a bowl.
4. Add Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, bay leaves, sweet basil, rosemary, salt, and pepper to the sour cream mixture.
5. Pour the sour cream mixture into a covered roaster.
6. Place the pheasant pieces into the roaster with the sour cream mixture.
7. Steam for several hours at 325°F until tender.
Remove from heat and serve.
